## 🔍 Cross-Page Patterns: Common HTML Issues

These HTML patterns cause the same accessibility errors across multiple pages. **Fix the pattern once in your codebase to fix it everywhere!**

### 🎯 Top Patterns to Fix (Highest Impact)

#### Pattern 1: Affects 100 page(s) - 100 occurrence(s)

**Scanner**: axe
**Rule**: [label-title-only](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/label-title-only?application=playwright)
**Impact**: serious
**Issue**: Form elements should have a visible label

**HTML Pattern**:
```html
<input type="text" name="q" id="buscador-header" maxlength="150" title="Buscar" placeholder="Buscar" class="ppg-search__input ppg-text ppg-text--lighted ppg-icon__search-ra" onfocus="javascript:this.value=''">
```

**XPath** (use in browser DevTools):
```
#buscador-header
```

**How to Replicate**:
1. Open any affected page in your browser
2. Press F12 to open DevTools
3. Go to Console tab
4. Run: `$x('#buscador-header')`
5. The element will be highlighted

**Affected Pages**:
- https://administracion.gob.es/
- https://administracion.gob.es/pag_Home
- https://administracion.gob.es/pag_Home/Tu-espacio-europeo/derechos-obligaciones/ciudadanos/asistencia-sanitaria/centros-atencion-sociosanitaria

#### Pattern 14: Affects 94 page(s) - 612 occurrence(s)

**Scanner**: ALFA
**Rule**: [SIA-R80: ASCII art has a text alternative](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r80)
**Issue**: The line height is specified using an absolute unit

**HTML Pattern**:
```html
<p class="txt_alignR">...</p>
```

**XPath** (use in browser DevTools):
```
/p[@class="txt_alignR"]
```

**How to Replicate**:
1. Open any affected page in your browser
2. Press F12 to open DevTools
3. Go to Console tab
4. Run: `$x('/p[@class="txt_alignR"]')`
5. The element will be highlighted

#### Pattern 15: Affects 79 page(s) - 468 occurrence(s)

**Scanner**: ALFA
**Rule**: [SIA-R71: Paragraphs of text are not justified](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r71)
**Issue**: The text of the paragraph is justified

**HTML Pattern**:
```html
<p class="textojustificado">...</p>
```

**XPath** (use in browser DevTools):
```
/p[@class="textojustificado"]
```

**How to Replicate**:
1. Open any affected page in your browser
2. Press F12 to open DevTools
3. Go to Console tab
4. Run: `$x('/p[@class="textojustificado"]')`
5. The element will be highlighted

## Detailed Failure Information (ALFA)

### https://administracion.gob.es/

#### Rule: [SIA-R111: Interactive elements have a sufficient target size](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r111)
**WCAG**: [SC 2.5.8](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/target-size-minimum) (Level AA)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<a data-fn="rrss" href="#ni" class="ppg-link ppg-link--header">Contacto</a>`
- XPath: `/a[@class="ppg-link ppg-link--header"]`

**Failure 2:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<a class="ppg-link ppg-link--btn" target="_blank" href="https://sede.administracion.gob.es/carpeta">...</a>`
- XPath: `/a[@class="ppg-link ppg-link--btn"]`

**Failure 3:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<button type="button" data-role="none" class="slick-prev slick-arrow slick-disabled" role="button" aria-disabled="true" style="">Anterior</button>`
- XPath: `/button[@class="slick-prev slick-arrow slick-disabled"]`

**Failure 4:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<ul class="slick-slide slick-current slick-active" data-slick-index="0" aria-hidden="false" tabindex="-1" role="option" aria-describedby="slick-slide00">...</ul>`
- XPath: `/ul[@class="slick-slide slick-current slick-active"]`

**Failure 5:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<ul class="slick-slide slick-active" data-slick-index="1" aria-hidden="false" tabindex="-1" role="option" aria-describedby="slick-slide01">...</ul>`
- XPath: `/ul[@class="slick-slide slick-active"]`

*... and 10 more failures for this rule*

- XPath: `/img[@class="fullImg"]`

#### Rule: [SIA-R3: lang attribute has a valid language code](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r3)
**WCAG**: [SC 3.1.1](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/language-of-page) (Level A)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element does not have a unique ID
- HTML: `<ul class="ppg-menu__list-2l" tabindex="0" id="submenu_principal" role="menubar">...</ul>`
- XPath: `/ul[@id="submenu_principal"]`

- Message: The heading skips one or more levels

- XPath: `/h3[@class="o-card__title ppg-heading t-fs-18"]`

#### Rule: [SIA-R66: Text has enhanced contrast with its background](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r66)

- XPath: `/p[@class="o-card__link ppg-icon__crossR-2a ppg-link"]`

- XPath: `/p[@class="txt_alignR"]`

**Failure 5:**

**WCAG**: [SC 4.1.2](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/name-role-value) (Level A)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The link does not have an accessible name
- HTML: `<a target="_blank" href="https://europa.eu/youreurope/search/index_en.htm">...</a>`
- XPath: `/a`

#### Rule: [SIA-R111: Interactive elements have a sufficient target size](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r111)
**WCAG**: [SC 2.5.8](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/target-size-minimum) (Level AA)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<a data-fn="rrss" href="#ni" class="ppg-link ppg-link--header">Contact</a>`
- XPath: `/a[@class="ppg-link ppg-link--header"]`

**Failure 2:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<a class="ppg-link ppg-link--btn" target="_blank" href="https://sede.administracion.gob.es/carpeta">...</a>`
- XPath: `/a[@class="ppg-link ppg-link--btn"]`

**Failure 3:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<a class="t-fs-16" href="/pag_Home/en/index.html" title="Punto de Acceso General">                           Start                  ...</a>`
- XPath: `/a[@class="t-fs-16"]`

**Failure 4:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<a href="/pag_Home/en/Tu-espacio-europeo/derechos-obligaciones/ciudadanos/consumidores/conexion-servicios/gas.html" class="">Gas</a>`
- XPath: `/a`

**Failure 5:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Target has insufficient size
- HTML: `<a href="#general_content" class="lnk_arriba disabled" title="Volver arriba">Volver arriba</a>`
- XPath: `/a[@class="lnk_arriba disabled"]`

*... and 4 more failures for this rule*

#### Rule: [SIA-R3: lang attribute has a valid language code](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r3)
**WCAG**: [SC 3.1.1](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/language-of-page) (Level A)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element does not have a unique ID
- HTML: `<ul class="ppg-menu__list-2l" tabindex="0" id="submenu_principal" role="menubar">...</ul>`
- XPath: `/ul[@id="submenu_principal"]`

#### Rule: [SIA-R66: Text has enhanced contrast with its background](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r66)
**WCAG**: [SC 1.4.6](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/contrast-enhanced) (Level AAA)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The highest possible contrast of the text is 5.51:1 which is         below the required contrast of 7:1

#### Rule: [SIA-R71: Paragraphs of text are not justified](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r71)
**WCAG**: Best Practice

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The text of the paragraph is justified
- HTML: `<p class="textojustificado">Household waste is hazardous or non-hazardous wast...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="textojustificado"]`

**Failure 2:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The text of the paragraph is justified
- HTML: `<p>...</p>`
- XPath: `/p`

#### Rule: [SIA-R73: Text spacing can be adjusted without loss of content](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r73)
**WCAG**: [SC 1.4.12](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/text-spacing) (Level AA)

**Failure 2:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05

**Failure 3:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p>...</p>`
- XPath: `/p`

**Failure 4:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p class="ppg-text ppg-text--top-lighted">Directorate-General of Public Governance</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="ppg-text ppg-text--top-lighted"]`

**Failure 5:**

- HTML: `<p class="ppg-text t-fs-10">Unión Europea  Fondo Europeo de Desarrollo Regiona...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="ppg-text t-fs-10"]`

**WCAG**: [SC 3.1.1](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/language-of-page) (Level A)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element does not have a unique ID
- HTML: `<ul class="ppg-menu__list-2l" tabindex="0" id="submenu_principal" role="menubar">...</ul>`
- XPath: `/ul[@id="submenu_principal"]`

#### Rule: [SIA-R42: Elements with an explicit ARIA role have the required parent element](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r42)
**WCAG**: [SC 1.3.1](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/info-and-relationships) (Level A)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
- HTML: `<li class="">...</li>`
- XPath: `/li`

**Failure 2:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
- HTML: `<h3 id="-63715b726c32" class="ppg-accordion__heading ui-accordion-header ui-corner-top ui-accordion-header-collapsed ui-corner-all ui-state-default ui-accordion-icons" role="tab" aria-controls="ui-id-1" aria-selected="false" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">...</h3>`
- XPath: `/h3[@id="-63715b726c32"]`

**Failure 3:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
- HTML: `<h3 id="-ddeea4ac8550" class="ppg-accordion__heading ui-accordion-header ui-corner-top ui-accordion-header-collapsed ui-corner-all ui-state-default ui-accordion-icons" role="tab" aria-controls="ui-id-2" aria-selected="false" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="-1">...</h3>`
- XPath: `/h3[@id="-ddeea4ac8550"]`

**Failure 4:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
- HTML: `<h3 id="-4291e3a8f124" class="ppg-accordion__heading ui-accordion-header ui-corner-top ui-accordion-header-collapsed ui-corner-all ui-state-default ui-accordion-icons" role="tab" aria-controls="ui-id-3" aria-selected="false" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="-1">...</h3>`
- XPath: `/h3[@id="-4291e3a8f124"]`

**Failure 5:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
- HTML: `<h3 id="-0bf0303839f3" class="ppg-accordion__heading ui-accordion-header ui-corner-top ui-accordion-header-collapsed ui-corner-all ui-state-default ui-accordion-icons" role="tab" aria-controls="ui-id-4" aria-selected="false" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="-1">...</h3>`
- XPath: `/h3[@id="-0bf0303839f3"]`

#### Rule: [SIA-R66: Text has enhanced contrast with its background](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r66)
**WCAG**: [SC 1.4.6](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/contrast-enhanced) (Level AAA)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The highest possible contrast of the text is 5.51:1 which is         below the required contrast of 7:1

#### Rule: [SIA-R68: Accessible name contains the visible label text](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r68)
**WCAG**: [SC 2.5.3](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/label-in-name) (Level A)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The element owns no elements as required by its semantic role
- HTML: `<ul data-fn="accordion" class="ppg-accordion ui-accordion ui-widget ui-helper-reset" role="tablist">...</ul>`
- XPath: `/ul[@class="ppg-accordion ui-accordion ui-widget ui-helper-reset"]`

#### Rule: [SIA-R71: Paragraphs of text are not justified](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r71)
**WCAG**: Best Practice

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The text of the paragraph is justified
- HTML: `<p class="textojustificado">...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="textojustificado"]`

#### Rule: [SIA-R73: Text spacing can be adjusted without loss of content](https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/sia-r73)
**WCAG**: [SC 1.4.12](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/text-spacing) (Level AA)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p class="textojustificado">...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="textojustificado"]`

**Failure 2:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p class="txt_alignR">...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="txt_alignR"]`

**Failure 3:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p class="ppg-text ppg-text--top-lighted">Dirección General de Gobernanza Pública</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="ppg-text ppg-text--top-lighted"]`

**Failure 4:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p>...</p>`
- XPath: `/p`

**Failure 5:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p class="ppg-text t-fs-10">Unión Europea  Fondo Europeo de Desarrollo Regiona...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="ppg-text t-fs-10"]`

- HTML: `<p class="o-card__text ppg-text ppg-text--lighted-2">Publicades les festes laborals per a l'any 2023</p>`

- XPath: `/p[@class="o-card__link ppg-icon__crossR-2a ppg-link"]`

**Failure 3:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p class="txt_alignR">...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="txt_alignR"]`

**Failure 4:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05

- HTML: `<p class="ppg-text t-margin-bottom-15">Accés directe a servicis electrònics freqüents</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="ppg-text t-margin-bottom-15"]`

**Failure 5:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: The line height of the paragraph is less than 1.5
- HTML: `<p class="textojustificado">Informaci&oacute;n pr&aacute;ctica, fiable y de ca...</p>`
- XPath: `/p[@class="textojustificado"]`

## Detailed Failure Information (axe)

### https://administracion.gob.es/

#### Rule: [aria-allowed-role](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/aria-allowed-role?application=playwright)
**Impact**: minor

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05

#### Rule: [link-in-text-block](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/link-in-text-block?application=playwright)
**Impact**: serious
**WCAG**: [SC 1.4.1](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/use-of-color) (Level A)

**Failure 1:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color
- HTML: `<a title="Aquí (Abre en nueva ventana)" href="https://www.cesce.es/es/corporativo/agencia-de-credito-a-la-exportacion-eca" target="_blank">Aquí<img alt="(Abre en nueva ventana)" src="/resources/templating-kit/themes/pag/img/general/icons/ico_enlace.png" class="ventana-nueva-next"></a>`
- XPath: `a[title="Aquí (Abre en nueva ventana)"]`

**Failure 2:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color
- HTML: `<a title="Seguro para Créditos de Circulante (Abre en nueva ventana)" href="https://www.cesce.es/creditos-circulante" target="_blank">`
- XPath: `.lista1:nth-child(5) > li:nth-child(1) > a[target="_blank"]`

**Failure 3:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
- Message: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

- XPath: `.lista1:nth-child(5) > li:nth-child(2) > a[target="_blank"]`

**Failure 4:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05

- HTML: `<a title="Crédito Comprador (Abre en nueva ventana)" href="https://www.cesce.es/poliza-de-credito-comprador" target="_blank">Crédito Comprador<img alt="(Abre en nueva ventana)" src="/resources/templating-kit/themes/pag/img/general/icons/ico_enlace.png" class="ventana-nueva-next"></a>`
- XPath: `.lista1:nth-child(5) > li:nth-child(3) > a[target="_blank"]`

**Failure 5:**
- First identified: 2026-04-05
